generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors collecting temperature data from physical building"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors detecting occupancy levels in building spaces"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring ambient light levels in building areas"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature operational data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy operational data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level operational data streams"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with device metadata and middleware configuration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators managing HVAC systems within Building Control System"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators managing lighting systems within Building Control System"
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT data exchange platform for sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin platform for IoT device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization engine for interactive 3D models"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building operations and energy usage"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization and visual comfort adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveAnalyticsInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization using reinforcement learning algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort adjustment based on real-time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, VisualComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current status of building systems for monitoring purposes"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated outcomes of building operations under various scenarios"
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted energy consumption and comfort levels based on sensor data"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized energy usage recommendations derived from reinforcement learning"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjustment recommendations for visual comfort based on lighting and occupancy data"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visual representation of building systems"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC and lighting systems for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building in AECO domain serving as physical asset for real-time monitoring and optimization"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, LightSensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator, CentralizedPlatform
]

instance CentralizedPlatform : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized platform with modular service-oriented components for scalability and extensibility"
    base:contains RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortAdjustmentService, Interactive3DVisualizationService, EclipseHono, Ditto, UnrealEngine5, BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin for BCS actuators (e.g., adjusting lighting intensity or HVAC settings) sent through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to the physical building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous bidirectional data exchange between physical and virtual components for immediate operational updates and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized framework integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular services via standardized extension points for holistic building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle phases including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment, with BIM as the semantic backbone for as-designed models and real-time data for as-operated conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness of the digital twin relative to the physical asset."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication via Eclipse Hono for device connectivity and Ditto for digital twin state management, using standardized IoT protocols for secure data exchange"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards and standardized extension points for service integration, ensuring interoperability across heterogeneous systems and engineering workflows."
]
